title: Bedtime Story for Kids Sleepy Firefly | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
GLOW GLOW! The firefly twinkles SOFT and SLOW!
A calming bedtime story for kids with Benny and a gentle garden friend.
Toddlers hear soft words, slow breaths, and cozy good-night routines.
Safe American English cartoon story for ages 2-8.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
